AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.root_cause: Inadequate lubrication — grease nipple blocked by debris; re-lubrication interval exceeded by 3 weeks
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.mechanism: Metal fatigue and spalling on inner race of Drive End bearing
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.immediate_action: Pump P-101A isolated and locked out; standby pump P-102A started
AREA-HP-SEP:P-101.corrective_action: Replace Drive End and Non-Drive End bearings; flush and refill bearing housing with Shell Gadus S2 V220 2 grease; re-establish 2-weekly lubrication schedule

AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.root_cause: Liquid carryover from LP Suction Scrubber V-201 due to high level caused by LP separator level control valve LCV-101 sticking open
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.mechanism: Liquid slug ingested into compressor impeller stages, causing reverse flow and pressure oscillation (surge)
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.immediate_action: K-201 tripped on surge protection; anti-surge valve PCV-201 opened; K-202 started in standby
AREA-LP-COMP:K-201.corrective_action: Overhaul LCV-101 actuator and positioner; clean scrubber mist eliminator; recalibrate surge controller setpoints; update operating procedure

AREA-WATER:E-301.root_cause: Produced water scale buildup on tube bundle — calcium carbonate scaling due to high bicarbonate content in produced water; scale inhibitor injection rate was insufficient
AREA-WATER:E-301.mechanism: Crystalline scale deposit on shell-side tubes reducing heat transfer coefficient by ~40%
AREA-WATER:E-301.immediate_action: Process routed through bypass; E-301 isolated for cleaning
AREA-WATER:E-301.corrective_action: Chemical descaling with 15% HCl solution; hydroblast tube bundle; re-assess scale inhibitor dosing rate (increase by 25%); install differential pressure indicator across bundle for early detection

AREA-UTIL:PT-145.root_cause: PT-145 process isolation diaphragm ruptured — fill fluid (silicone oil) leaked into impulse line, causing reading to drift positively
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.mechanism: Micro-fracture in Hastelloy C-276 diaphragm, likely due to process fluid H2S stress corrosion
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.immediate_action: PT-145 flagged as bad actor; PT-146 (redundant) used as primary measurement; alarm limits adjusted
AREA-UTIL:PT-145.corrective_action: Replace PT-145 with Emerson 3051S HART transmitter; upgrade wetted materials to Alloy 400; review remaining pressure transmitters for same diaphragm batch

AREA-WATER:P-303.root_cause: Cooling water pump P-303 mechanical seal failed — O-ring degraded due to intermittent dry running caused by low suction head during low tide window
AREA-WATER:P-303.mechanism: Seal face wear and O-ring elastomer swelling/cracking due to thermal cycling
AREA-WATER:P-303.immediate_action: P-303 isolated; standby cooling pump P-304 started; temperatures monitored; no process trips
AREA-WATER:P-303.corrective_action: Replace dual mechanical seal assembly with upgraded AISI 316 faces; install low-suction-pressure trip at 0.3 bar; review suction vessel level control

AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.root_cause: Annual scheduled turnaround (AT2024) — planned statutory inspection and maintenance
AREA-UTIL:FAC-001.corrective_action: Complete all planned maintenance activities per turnaround scope: vessel inspections, PSV testing, relief valve overhauls, instrumentation calibration, electrical thermography

AREA-EXPORT:P-501.root_cause: Flange leak on export header at 8" weld neck flange NPA-EXP-FLG-047 — spiral wound gasket failure caused by over-torquing during previous maintenance; combined with H2S pitting on flange face
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.mechanism: Gasket blowout under operating pressure; hydrocarbon vapour release detected by fixed gas detector GD-501
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.immediate_action: ESD activated; export header depressurised; area evacuated; gas cloud confirmed safe after 45 minutes; hot work permit system suspended
AREA-EXPORT:P-501.corrective_action: Replace spiral wound gasket with ASME B16.20 Inconel 825 ring gasket; dress flange faces; re-torque to specification using calibrated torque wrench; update bolting procedure to include anti-seize compound
